text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Dirt Derby is starting!<n>Given that it's a
regional dirt race, I<n>feel like the mood's gonna be
a<n>smidge different from a central turf<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Given the change of environment, will<n>everyone
still be just as passionate?<n>Or were the races I
saw before<n>special?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna check for myself. I just<n>know this is
where I'll find the source<n>of Umamusume charm
I've been<n>chasing!
